projectDescription: An orchestrator that watches your Linear backlog and automatically opens pull requests by running Claude Code against labeled issues in your GitHub repos.
keyFeatures: Polls Linear every 60 seconds for issues labeled AI-Implement and automatically dispatches implementation runs
Runs Claude Code via GitHub Actions or Fly Machines to implement tickets and open pull requests
Posts a gap analysis comment on every PR comparing the diff to the original issue specification
Comment /ai-implement on any PR to trigger a gap-fill run on the existing branch
Planning phase: Claude reads the codebase and posts architecture analysis and test plan comments to Linear before implementation
Admin UI for managing team-to-repo mappings, concurrency limits, and orchestrator settings
Supports Anthropic API, Claude OAuth, and AWS Bedrock as Claude providers
Per-repo WORKFLOW.md and PLANNING.md prompt templates that teams own and customise
Extensible via custom/ directory for custom pipeline steps and providers
Per-repo custom runner images for repos needing extra runtimes or tools
publicApiSurface: Linear label: AI-Implement (triggers implementation run)
Linear label: AI-Planning (triggers planning run)
PR comment: /ai-implement (triggers gap-fill run on existing PR)
Admin UI: GET/POST /admin — web dashboard for managing mappings and settings
Admin API: GET /api/mappings — list all team→repo mappings
Admin API: POST /api/mappings — create or update a team→repo mapping
Admin API: PATCH /api/mappings/:teamKey — update concurrency cap
Admin API: DELETE /api/mappings/:teamKey — remove a mapping
Admin API: GET /api/log — dispatch audit log
Admin API: GET /api/sessions — list active Fly Machine sessions
Admin API: DELETE /api/sessions/:machineId — destroy a running session
Admin API: GET/POST /api/runner-mode — get or set runner mode
Admin API: GET/POST /api/settings — orchestrator-level settings
Admin API: GET/POST/DELETE /api/global-secrets — manage global Fly secrets
Admin API: GET/POST/DELETE /api/mappings/:teamKey/secrets — manage per-team Fly secrets
GitHub webhook: POST /api/github/webhook — receives GitHub events
WORKFLOW.md front matter: model, gap_analysis_model, setup, verify, teardown
PLANNING.md front matter: model
custom/pipelines/ — override pipeline YAML definitions
custom/steps/ — override or add pipeline step modules
custom/providers/ — override provider modules
.ai-implement/image.yml — per-repo custom Fly Machine runner image
